.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 1.8 for the build environment.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize JDK 21 language features and class files.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in favor of release for modern JDKs to ensure consistent toolchain usage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for modern Spring Boot/JDK versions.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in newer ecosystems; code using javax.annotation annotations will fail to compile or link if the dependency is missing or if the runtime expects Jakarta namespaces.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with JDK 21.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element of a list.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0; using getFirst() is the required modern API.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element of a header list.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0; using getFirst() is the required modern API.
